allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\(''lucide-react''\); console.log\(''GitCompareArrows:'', !!l.GitCompareArrows\); console.log\(''Send:'', !!l.Send\); console.log\(''ArrowDownWideNarrow:'', !!l.ArrowDownWideNarrow\); console.log\(''CircleX:'', !!l.CircleX\); console.log\(''Timer:'', !!l.Timer\); console.log\(''Sparkles:'', !!l.Sparkles\);")
